title: One Battle After Another's Ambitious Edit by Andy Jurgensen Sends Paul Thomas Anderson's Film to the Oscars
text: Andy Jurgensen's editing work on One Battle After Another earned the film an Oscar nomination and ultimately the win for Best Film Editing. Jurgensen's second feature editing role demonstrates his mastery of the craft, creating a narrative that glides flawlessly across action sequences and character moments. The editing reveals minimal viewer awareness of the craft itself—a hallmark of exceptional editing. Jurgensen's work was instrumental in propelling One Battle After Another toward the Best Picture win. His editing decisions enhanced the emotional resonance of director Paul Thomas Anderson's adaptation of Thomas Pynchon's Vineland. The collaboration between Anderson and Jurgensen proved successful in the awards race, contributing to the film's dominance at the Academy Awards. Jurgensen's achievement marks a milestone for a relatively young editor working on a major studio production.
